lines: Population. Brazil leads with 216 million people. Germany has 84 million.
GDP. Germany takes this at 4.5 trillion dollars. Brazil follows with 2.1 trillion.
Land Area. Brazil is massive at 8.5 million square kilometers. Germany has just 357 thousand.
Manufacturing Output. Germany is a powerhouse at 780 billion dollars. Brazil has 260 billion.
FIFA World Cup Wins. Brazil leads all time with 5 World Cups. Germany has 4.
Life Expectancy. Germany leads at 81 years. Brazil is at 76.
Forest Coverage. Brazil has 4.9 million square kilometers of forest. Germany has 114 thousand.
Olympic Medals. Germany leads with 1,350 total medals. Brazil has 150.
The final score. Five to four. Germany wins!
